seoDescription: Planning guides, technical notes, and practical documents for site operations and procurement teams.

hero.heading: Technical Resources
hero.body: Access practical GenFix guides for procurement, deployment, commissioning, and ongoing diesel generator performance management.

sections.title: Featured Resource Topics
sections.body: These resources are written for project managers, operations teams, and procurement stakeholders making critical power decisions.

cards.title: Generator Rental Best Practice
cards.description: A practical checklist for selecting temporary power equipment and reducing deployment risk.

cards.title: Equipment Rental vs Ownership
cards.description: Decision framework for balancing capex, operational risk, and lifecycle support obligations.

cards.title: Website Safety Alert
cards.description: Guidance for verifying official channels and reducing supplier impersonation risk.

sections.title: Most Requested Technical Guides
sections.body: Start with these high-use guides when planning deployment standards, commercial models, or operational optimization.

cards.title: Commissioning Handover Guide
cards.description: Checklist-driven commissioning and handover steps that reduce startup and acceptance risk.

cards.title: Rental vs Ownership Guide
cards.description: Commercial comparison framework for deciding between short-term rental and capital purchase.

cards.title: Performance Optimization Guide
cards.description: Practical methods to improve reliability, service planning, and runtime efficiency.
